players.name: Nyara Sabally
players.injury_comment: Sabally is sidelined for a third consecutive contest with a right hamstring injury. Her next chance to play arrives Friday, when the Tempo take on the Sun in Connecticut. Isabelle Harrison appears to be the primary fantasy beneficiary of Sabally's continued absence.
